title: LIORQUE Visual Timer for Kids, Kitchen Timer for Cooking, 60 Minute Visual Countdown Time Management Tools with Silent Operation & Egg Design
features: INTERESTING CARTOON TIMER- the LIORQUE Visual Timer is the ideal choice for cooking in the kitchen. Its cute design adds an element of fun for children as they complete tasks, helping them stay focused.

EASY TO USE - 60 minutes visual timer. Turn it clockwise to set the time, then start timing. When time’s up, the visual disk disappears and the bell rings. If you want to silence the alarm, simply press the button in the top right corner.

ADJUSTABLE ALARM -We have added a pause function to this visual timer, allowing you to pause the countdown at any time for better control over your timing. Additionally, this timer features adjustable volume and options for 5s/30s alarm durations, providing you with added convenience.
MULTIPURPOSE TIMER - This visual timer can be used as a kids timer, teacher timer, study timer, classroom timer, cooking timer, bathroom timer, meeting timer, pomodoro timer, egg timer and etc
TIME MANAGEMENT TOOL - Get a LIORQUE visual analog timer, say goodbye to Procrastination, Weak motivation, Game addiction, Ineffective learning and working, Lack of planning
description: Product Description LIORQUE 60-Minute Visual Timer for Kids Visual timer enhances focus by setting specific time limits, helping children transition and seeing how long until they are done with their “time outs” and helping children complete tasks within the designated timeframe. With fun Egg design, it can also stimulate children's interest. Use Simple Tools to Make Things Easier Visual timer allows children to see the passage of time, just like an hourglass, they can simply understand how long 10 minutes is. At a glance, they can see how much time is left, which is easier to understand than reading numbers Visual Timing Time visualization lets you know how much time is left just by a glance, rather than reading numbers Pause Mode During the countdown, press and hold the button for 3 seconds, the start pauses; press and hold the button for 3 seconds again to resume the countdown Sillent Option LIORQUE visual timer has added silent option, you can choose between Unmute or Mute depending on your needs Easy to Operate Anyone can easily use it, just turn the knob to increase the time clockwise and decrease time counter-clockwise Adjustable Volume This visual timer has an alarm function to remind you of your schedule. Power On Before use, please open the battery cover, remove the battery insulation sheet, and install the battery correctly Alarm Duration Choose between two ringing durations—5 seconds or 30 seconds—based on your needs Cute Egg Design Designed to resemble a small Egg! This timer combines functionality with a nostalgic aesthetic making it a addition to any workspace or kitchen Visual Timer Visual Timer Add To Basket Visual Timer Add To Basket Visual Timer Buying Options Visual Timer Buying Options Visual Timer Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 87 4.5 out of 5 stars 4,061 4.8 out of 5 stars 127 4.6 out of 5 stars 134 4.5 out of 5 stars 570 Price £11.99 £ 11 . 99 £10.99 £ 10 . 99 — — — Dimension 9.5x8.5cm 7 x 7 cm 11 x 10.7cm 7 x 7 cm 19 x 19 cm Material ABS ABS ABS ABS ABS Magnetic ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Weight/g 50 80 150 80 450 Weight Battery Battery Battery Battery Battery
